reasoning: Based on comprehensive evidence: 1) March 2025 article explicitly states Starlink service in Chad will be 'available nationwide by the end of 2025', indicating no launch before July 1; 2) Chad is NOT listed among 18 operational African countries in April 2025 listings; 3) Timeline slipped from initial '2024' target to 'end of 2025'; 4) Only 3.5 months remain from May 2025 cutoff to July 1 deadline, making a launch unlikely.
